generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (-1), so the T1 atomic fear appeal reinforces rather than converts. The profile's very low neuroticism (8th pct) and high emotional stability dampen fear-based persuasion, while moderate openness (58th pct) and high trust (74th pct) may allow some narrative uptake, but the low conscientiousness (16th pct) and very low self-discipline (1st pct) reduce sustained engagement with the message. The net effect is a small movement of 14 points further negative, consistent with a weak reinforcement of an existing stance under a low-intensity, short-horizon attack.
